title: cedrela longifolia
intro: Cedrela longifolia, also known as toona or toon tree, is a deciduous tree native to the tropical regions of Asia. The bark, leaves, and wood of this tree have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cedrela longifolia include reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as aiding in the treatment of skin conditions and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves are typically used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness the medicinal properties of this plant.
